title: Night Vision no Optifine
description: Lightweight vanilla datapack that provides automatic, toggleable night vision support for all players in singleplayer or servers.
body:
## **🌙 Night Vision Datapack (No OptiFine Required)**

Do you ever wish you could explore caves, mine at night, or build in dark places without constantly placing torches or relying on OptiFine?
This Night Vision Datapack gives you permanent, smooth night vision — completely within vanilla Minecraft Java Edition!

It’s lightweight, server-friendly, and doesn’t need any mods or resource packs. Once installed, you’ll never have to worry about darkness again.


## **🧠 Features**

**✨ Full Night Vision Support**
Grants permanent night vision to all players automatically when they join or reload the world.

**⚙️ Works in Vanilla Minecraft**
No need for OptiFine, Fabric, Forge, or any external mods — pure vanilla datapack!

**🧍‍♂️ Per-Player System**
Each player automatically gets night vision without affecting others’ gameplay settings.

**🔄 Toggle Support**
You can easily enable or disable night vision using a simple in-game command. Perfect for players who prefer playing with natural lighting sometimes.

**🔧 Performance Friendly**
Built with optimized functions and commands — won’t affect your FPS or game performance.

**🌐 Multiplayer Ready**
Completely compatible with realms, LAN worlds, and multiplayer servers.

**🪶 Lightweight & Clean Code**
No unnecessary features, no lag — just simple, effective night vision for everyone.


## **⚙️ Installation Guide**

Download the datapack .zip file from the Files section.
Open your Minecraft world folder.
Go to: .minecraft/saves/<your world>/datapacks/
Place the .zip file inside the /datapacks folder.
Launch Minecraft and open that world.
Type /reload in chat.
You’ll see a message confirming successful installation.

Enjoy full night vision instantly — no torches required! 🔦

✅ Tip: If you’re using this on a server, make sure cheats or operator permissions are enabled for setup.


## **💡 Compatibility**

Minecraft Version: 1.21.x and above
Edition: Java Edition only
Dependencies: None — no OptiFine or mods required
Conflicts: None known (works fine with other datapacks)
**🧾 Commands**

Here are some helpful commands you can use:

Command	Description
/reload	Reloads the datapack and applies effects again
/effect clear @a night_vision	Removes night vision from all players


**📦 Perfect For**

🏗️ Builders: See your creations clearly at night without extra lighting.
⚔️ Survival Players: Explore caves, mine ores, or fight mobs without carrying torches.
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Server Owners: Make your players’ experience smoother by ensuring visibility everywhere.
🎮 YouTubers / Streamers: Keep your videos bright and clear even in dark environments.

**🧰 Additional Information**

You can safely remove this datapack anytime — it won’t damage your world.
Compatible with most other datapacks and command systems.
Designed for Minecraft Java Edition only (not Bedrock).

**❤️ Support the Creator**

If you like this datapack, please leave a like, follow, or share it with your friends!
Your support motivates me to create more fun and useful datapacks for the community. 🙌
